---
title: "About"
---

I'm a Research Professor at University of Seoul. My research focuses on hydrology, particularly climate extremes and their relation to freshwater ecology. I work on understanding extreme events impacts to our water resources and how we can adapt. I am interested in the space where environmental science, policy, and industry meet, and in building research that is legible and useful across all three.

## Contact
- **Email** — psdfabian@gmail.com
- **LinkedIn** — [in/pamelasofiafabian](https://www.linkedin.com/in/pamelasofiafabian/)
- **ResearchGate** — [Profile](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Pamela-Sofia-Fabian)
- **Web of Science** — [Profile](https://www.webofscience.com/wos/author/search)
- **ORCID** — [0000-0002-9196-212X](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-9196-212X)
- **GitHub** — [sofiefab](https://github.com/sofiefab)

---
